overview: Beauty N Joy is a premium beauty parlour website with a luxurious, elegant, feminine design. Features all key sections including services showcase, gallery, pricing, testimonials, FAQ, and contact — built with a soft pink, gold, and nude color palette.
features: Sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu and Book Appointment CTA
Full-height hero section with luxury salon imagery and animations
Services grid with 8 animated service cards
Gallery with 10 images, hover effects, and lightbox popup
Pricing cards for Basic, Premium, and Bridal packages
Testimonials carousel with auto-scroll and star ratings
Contact form with Google Map embed and WhatsApp integration
Scroll-to-top button and sticky WhatsApp floating button
